title: Citrusy Chewy Korean Quinoa Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and chewy solo-dinner dish with high-protein-friendly quinoa as the base, served as a satisfying side or main course.

ingredients.name: Quinoa
ingredients.notes: Pre-rinsed and soaked for at least 30 minutes

ingredients.name: Korean Quercetin Citrus Powder
ingredients.notes: Available in health food stores or online

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.amount: Enough to cover the quinoa and for soaking

instructions: Boil the quinoa in enough water to cover it, then let it soak for at least 30 minutes.
Drain and rinse the quinoa. In a wok or large frying pan, heat some oil over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and sauté until fragrant (about 1 minute).
Add carrots and peppers if using, stirring to combine well with the garlic mixture for about 2 minutes.
Pour in the Korean Quercetin Citrus Powder and stir for a couple of seconds.
Slowly pour in the boiled quinoa, ensuring it is fully coated with the citrus powder. Stir until evenly mixed and heated through.
Add Korean Chili Garlic Sauce and continue to stir-fry for another 2 minutes until the mixture is hot and well combined.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
